visual_description: A man in a white shirt and tie stands in a dimly lit hallway, partially obscured by vertical bars, looking toward the right. Another man in a denim jacket walks past him, his gaze directed downward as he moves forward. The background shows a cluttered indoor space with shelves, office equipment, and another person seated at a desk.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a neutral tone, speaking at a moderate pace with a slight breathiness and a sigh at the end.
